title: Delete all occurrences of a key in DLL

content.problemStatement: Given the head of a doubly linked list and an integer target. Delete all nodes in the linked list with the value target and return the head of the modified linked list.
constraints: 1 <= Number of nodes in the linked list <= 10^5
content.inputFormat: The input will contain the head of a doubly linked list and an integer target. The head of the doubly linked list is represented as a sequence of integers, and the target is an integer.
content.outputFormat: The output will be the head of the modified doubly linked list after deleting all nodes with the target value.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Iterate through the linked list and delete nodes with the target value.

code.Python3:
# Node class for the doubly linked list
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        # Value stored in the node
        self.data = val
        # Pointer to the previous node
        self.prev = None
        # Pointer to the next node
        self.next = None

# Solution class containing all operations on the doubly linked list
class Solution:
    # Deletes all nodes that have the specified target value
    def delete_target_nodes(self, head, target):
        # Start from the head node
        current = head

        # Traverse the entire list
        while current:
            # Store next node before possibly deleting current
            next_node = current.next

            # If current node matches the target value
            if current.data == target:
                # If not the head, link previous node to next
                if current.prev:
                    current.prev.next = current.next
                else:
                    # If it's the head, move head forward
                    head = current.next  

                # If not the tail, link next node to previous
                if current.next:
                    current.next.prev = current.prev

            # Move to the next node
            current = next_node

        # Return updated head
        return head
